1855310.name: Warlock's Dungeon
1855310.description:
Battle your way through hordes of the Warlock's minions in this dungeon crawler! Find better armor and weapons to help you survive, level up to increase your stats, learn new skills to smite your enemies or heal yourself. In the end, will you be able to defeat the evil Warlock and free your people from his tyranny?

***Please Note IF YOU PLAY THE DEMO***

The game is still in ALPHA phase. You may experience bugs, poor quality animations, sounds, VFX, etc. and other issues. Feel free to point things out in the community hub! 

Things we are currently working on:

  • Animations

  • Sounds

  • Visual Effects

  • Game Balance

  • Other game mechanics

  • Adding items

  • Adding creatures

  • Lots of other cool stuff!
1855310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
